item.title: Daiso, Nitori, Muji, 12 best-selling products with unlimited repurchase!
item.itunes:title: Daiso, Nitori, Muji, 12 best-selling products with unlimited repurchase!
item.itunes:author: 蛙家Waja
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_N9YowNhUzc Dear Waja fans~ It has been more than 4 years since the establishment of Frog Family. Introducing many good products with high CP value from Daiso, Yideli, and Muji Among them, there are still some missing ones with extremely high repurchase rates. 12 best-selling items that netizens say they will stock up on again after they run out Let’s take a look at what practical and best-selling products Frog has missed in the past few years. 📍Video catalog 00:00｜Video starts 00:57｜DAISO women's special lotion 01:31｜DAISO cans 02:04｜DAISO foam absorbing filter paper/tempura oil absorbing paper/fried oil absorbing paper 02:57｜NITORI super strong absorbent sponge 03:58｜NITORI super absorbent PVA multifunctional wipes 04:54｜NITORI kitchen and living room wiping cloth 05:50｜NITORI Binchotan shoe cabinet mat 04:46｜Muji three-layer polyurethane sponge 07:48｜Muji Nail Nourishing Oil/Finger Edge Softening Oil 08:26｜Muji polypropylene pill box 08:26｜Muji nylon mesh pencil case
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_N9YowNhUzc Dear Waja fans~ It has been more than 4 years since the establishment of Frog Family. Introducing many good products with high CP value from Daiso, Yideli, and Muji Among them, there are still some missing ones with extremely high repurchase rates. 12 best-selling items that netizens say they will stock up on again after they run out Let’s take a look at what practical and best-selling products Frog has missed in the past few years. 📍Video catalog 00:00｜Video starts 00:57｜DAISO women's special lotion 01:31｜DAISO cans 02:04｜DAISO foam absorbing filter paper/tempura oil absorbing paper/fried oil absorbing paper 02:57｜NITORI super strong absorbent sponge 03:58｜NITORI super absorbent PVA multifunctional wipes 04:54｜NITORI kitchen and living room wiping cloth 05:50｜NITORI Binchotan shoe cabinet mat 04:46｜Muji three-layer polyurethane sponge 07:48｜Muji Nail Nourishing Oil/Finger Edge Softening Oil 08:26｜Muji polypropylene pill box 08:26｜Muji nylon mesh pencil case
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_N9YowNhUzc Dear Waja fans~ It has been more than 4 years since the establishment of Frog Family. Introducing many good products with high CP value from Daiso, Yideli, and Muji Among them, there are still some missing ones with extremely high repurchase rates. 12 best-selling items that netizens say they will stock up on again after they run out Let’s take a look at what practical and best-selling products Frog has missed in the past few years. 📍Video catalog 00:00｜Video starts 00:57｜DAISO women's special lotion 01:31｜DAISO cans 02:04｜DAISO foam absorbing filter paper/tempura oil absorbing paper/fried oil absorbing paper 02:57｜NITORI super strong absorbent sponge 03:58｜NITORI super absorbent PVA multifunctional wipes 04:54｜NITORI kitchen and living room wiping cloth 05:50｜NITORI Binchotan shoe cabinet mat 04:46｜Muji three-layer polyurethane sponge 07:48｜Muji Nail Nourishing Oil/Finger Edge Softening Oil 08:26｜Muji polypropylene pill box 08:26｜Muji nylon mesh pencil case

item.title: 28-square-foot smart house renovation technique for lazy people! Feat. 蛋殼居日記@eggshell_diary ｜蛙家到你家
item.itunes:title: 28-square-foot smart house renovation technique for lazy people! Feat. 蛋殼居日記@eggshell_diary ｜蛙家到你家
item.itunes:author: 蛙家Waja
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S7xRBWMsm80 \"There is no perfect home renovation, only the most suitable home atmosphere.\" Today, Frog House visited the home of YouTuber # Dankeju Diary Neo and Ashan. After buying a house for more than two years, they have successively renovated their homes, ranging from minor changes to The lantern in the living room is as large as planning a smart home for lazy people. Various modifications have been studied in depth and the most suitable modification method for the home has been found. What exactly have they modified for a newly built house of 28 square meters? How to plan a smart home so that the whole family can achieve lazy control? ※Important reminder: Please abide by the rules when leaving messages, and everyone must be polite! -- 📍 Guests: Dankeju Diary, Neo and Ashan IG [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/bdf7G/wajaYT Blog [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/fZ455/wajaYT -- ✨Become a member of this channel and get benefits｜https://lihi2.com/1vkDh/wajaYT 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍Recommended products from Wajia Shopee｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙More good news will be announced first! Join the community and lock in | https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT 📍Video catalog 00:00｜Video starts 00:01｜Morning Routine: What do the Dankeju couple do on holiday mornings? 01:23｜Character Story Q\u0026A: 02:06｜Room Tour: Favorite area after renovation 04:13｜Q: When would you like to start remodeling your home? 05:01｜Room Tour: Second Bedroom-Special Paint Renovation 05:40｜Room Tour: Entrance-Blackboard Magnetic Paint Transformation 06:21｜Room Tour: Balcony- transformed into a small garden 07:33｜Q: What are the key points of smart home transformation experience and planning? 08:37｜Room Tour: Key points of smart curtain transformation 09:38｜Room Tour: Automatically switch on and off the air conditioner 10:12｜Room Tour: Automatically switch lights on and off 10:32｜Room Tour: Smart Rubik’s Cube Controller 11:13｜Q: Suggestions for DIY smart home installation 12:04｜Room Tour: Tips for home storage 13:45｜Dankeju’s recommended products: Shibazhi folding chairs, folding beds, and electric lift tables 📍Video series Unboxing review｜https://lihi1.com/ATZi6/wajaYT Life Wisdom IDEAS｜https://lihi1.com/ABY2J/wajaYT Storage and transformation laboratory｜https://lihi1.com/AFnRG/wajaYT 🐸 About us 🐸 Subscribe to [waja] YouTube channel: https://lihi1.com/3j1qQ/wajaYT Follow [waja] Instagram account: https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYT Join the [Life Good Things Research Laboratory] club: https://lihi1.com/vk2Rn/wajaYT Join the [Storage and Transformation Research Laboratory] club: https://lihi1.com/sorFl/wajaYT Join the [Decoration DIY Research Laboratory] club: https://lihi1.cc/pva86/wajaYT Like [waja Family’s Frog Powder Habitat] Facebook fan page: https://lihi1.cc/G82gV/wajaYT Please contact [Business and Cooperation Contact] Email: wesley_yang@hmg.com.tw #frog home #storage renovation laboratory #life coup #unboxing review #frog home to your home #dankeju diary #smart home #special paint transformation #BlackboardPaint #MagneticPaint #MineralPaint #EighteenPaper #ElectricLiftTable
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S7xRBWMsm80 \"There is no perfect home renovation, only the most suitable home atmosphere.\" Today, Frog House visited the home of YouTuber # Dankeju Diary Neo and Ashan. After buying a house for more than two years, they have successively renovated their homes, ranging from minor changes to The lantern in the living room is as large as planning a smart home for lazy people. Various modifications have been studied in depth and the most suitable modification method for the home has been found. What exactly have they modified for a newly built house of 28 square meters? How to plan a smart home so that the whole family can achieve lazy control? ※Important reminder: Please abide by the rules when leaving messages, and everyone must be polite! -- 📍 Guests: Dankeju Diary, Neo and Ashan IG [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/bdf7G/wajaYT Blog [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/fZ455/wajaYT -- ✨Become a member of this channel and get benefits｜https://lihi2.com/1vkDh/wajaYT 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍Recommended products from Wajia Shopee｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙More good news will be announced first! item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S7xRBWMsm80 \"There is no perfect home renovation, only the most suitable home atmosphere.\" Today, Frog House visited the home of YouTuber # Dankeju Diary Neo and Ashan. After buying a house for more than two years, they have successively renovated their homes, ranging from minor changes to The lantern in the living room is as large as planning a smart home for lazy people. Various modifications have been studied in depth and the most suitable modification method for the home has been found. What exactly have they modified for a newly built house of 28 square meters? How to plan a smart home so that the whole family can achieve lazy control? ※Important reminder: Please abide by the rules when leaving messages, and everyone must be polite! -- 📍 Guests: Dankeju Diary, Neo and Ashan IG [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/bdf7G/wajaYT Blog [Dankeju Diary]: https://lihi2.com/fZ455/wajaYT -- ✨Become a member of this channel and get benefits｜https://lihi2.com/1vkDh/wajaYT 🔥Follow IG to see more content｜https://lihi1.com/TdSQ2/wajaYTup 👍Recommended products from Wajia Shopee｜https://lihi1.com/DVl5L/wajaYT ㊙More good news will be announced first!
